description:
Same shape as fz-jvo, in src/typer.rs:

- tuple_projections (line 19): unions across all pos sigs of all
  clauses regardless of whether they're conjuncts (intersect) or
  alternatives (union).
- map_field_lookup (line 40): same pattern.

For a Descr like `tuple(int, int) & tuple(any, any)` (which arises
from branch narrowing), the projection of field 0 should be
`int ∩ any = int`. Currently returns `int ∪ any = any`.

## Fix shape (mirrors fz-jvo)

For each clause (Conj):
  - Intersect across pos sigs (within the clause).
  - Union across clauses.

## Acceptance

- No existing test regresses (current behavior is conservative
  over-approximation; tightening loses no soundness).
- tuple-of-narrows fixtures show projection types matching
  intersection, not union.

## Out of scope

- Negative sigs (`clause.neg`) handling. Subtractive narrowing
  is harder; leave for follow-up.
title: fz-typer.field-extract-intersect: tuple_projections + map_field_lookup share the intersect bug
